title: Deal Radar
subtitle: Everything that needs your attention today: heat signals, pending actions, and risk alerts, all in one place.

signals.title: No signals yet
signals.description: Upload and share documents, and AI will automatically identify high-intent investors/customers and generate signals.

documents.title: No documents yet
documents.description: Upload your first pitch deck or sales proposal to start tracking heat.

sig_1.title: Sarah Chen is heating up
sig_1.description: Horizon VC partner visited the Pitch Deck 3 times in the past 24 hours and spent 5 minutes on the financial slides.
sig_1.explanation: Repeat visits to key slides signal strong investment intent.
sig_1.suggestion: Send a term sheet summary within 24 hours and propose a 30-minute call.

sig_2.title: Marcus keeps returning to the team slide
sig_2.description: Boldstart Principal opened the Pitch Deck for the third time and spent 3 minutes on the team slide.
sig_2.explanation: Team is a key decision slide for early-stage investors; repeated views indicate a deep dive.
sig_2.suggestion: Send founder bios and recommendation letters.

sig_3.title: Wei Li is focused on the revenue forecast
sig_3.description: Future Fund LP viewed the revenue forecast page in the financial model for over 2 minutes.
sig_3.explanation: LPs typically focus on cash flow and returns, which signals they're entering evaluation.

sig_4.title: Unidentified visitor downloaded Pitch Deck
sig_4.description: An unidentified email downloaded the Pitch Deck through a public link.
sig_4.explanation: Public links can leak. Tighten access controls.
sig_4.suggestion: Require email verification and enable download watermarks.

act_3.title: Schedule financial model walkthrough with Wei Li

risk_1.title: Unidentified email downloaded Pitch Deck
risk_1.description: Public link was downloaded by alex@unknown.com; potential leak risk.

risk_2.title: Link expired
risk_2.description: Financial Model link expired on 2026-06-17. Renew or notify recipients.
